sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71347" key="nw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νώ</orth>, <sense id="n71347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐγώ</ref> </xr> III. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n71347.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νῷ,</foreign> dat. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νοῦς.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
